title: Pittsburgh Steelers Radio Network
summary:
The Pittsburgh Steelers Radio Network is an American radio network composed of 39 radio stations which carry English-language coverage of the Pittsburgh Steelers, a professional football team in the National Football League (NFL). The announcers are Rob King and Max Starks. Missi Matthews is the sideline reporter.
Since 2013, co-owned Pittsburgh market stations WDVE (102.5 FM) and WBGG (970 AM) have served as the network's two flagships. The network also includes 37 affiliates in the U.S. states of Pennsylvania, Georgia, Maryland, New Jersey, Ohio, Virginia, and West Virginia: 18 AM stations (15 of which have a low-power FM translator); and 19 full-power FM stations.

Station list
Blue background indicates low-power FM translator.
Gray background indicates station is a simulcast of another station.
